description_long: This is a modern, multi-story house with a flat roof and a geometric, minimalist design. The exterior features large floor-to-ceiling windows, clean white and gray facades, and a wooden privacy fence enclosing a landscaped yard. The house includes multiple outdoor living spaces, such as a patio with lounge chairs, a dining area, and a covered carport. A distinctive sculptural tree is present in the yard, adding a unique visual element. The structure is composed of several interconnected rectangular volumes, creating a dynamic and contemporary architectural profile. The property is surrounded by greenery and appears well-integrated into an urban neighborhood setting.
description: A modern, multi-story house with flat roofs, large windows, and a fenced yard featuring outdoor living spaces and a sculptural tree.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, and the sculptural tree on the left side within the fenced yard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the expansive glass facade, outdoor lounge chairs, and dining area within the fenced yard.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the house, additional windows, and a covered carport adjacent to the fence.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the secondary entrance, more windows, and the sculptural tree near the corner of the yard.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and vertical strips
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a minimalist door, small porch area, and is flanked by large windows and simple landscaping.
